discrepancies.title: Picture-chain disposition divergence (2 separate / 2 subsume)
discrepancies.description: Witnesses split 2-2 on whether picture-chain v1.20+ should be deposited as a standalone Zenodo artefact (W1 Gemini + W2 Grok) or subsumed into Umbrella v2.2 as an appendix (W3 Claude + W4 GPT-5.5). Most-conservative aggregation defaults to subsume (less archival clutter; can be separated later if independent justification emerges) but operator decision is required.
discrepancies.default_recommendation: subsume into Umbrella v2.2 appendix unless independently justified

discrepancies.title: OP-DP0 HALTED at Phase 2 (carry-forward; Path A vs Path B adjudication)
discrepancies.description: OP-DP0 RULE 1 lift directive packet HALTED at Phase 2 (S147 verdict not found in bridge). UF-OP-DP0-1 (filed in OP-DP0-RULE-1-LIFT-DIRECTIVE-PACKET-20260510 at bridge c7c0562) flagged literal-trigger ambiguity: Path A (literal-S147 verdict required) vs Path B (documented-commitment-lift per cascade-132 §5; bridge 7786a67 annotates m10-resolved=TRUE). Three prior synth verdicts (139/143R/149) recommend Path B. S154 ladder is conditional on Path B confirmation.

discrepancies.title: Reputational coupling risk if SIARC/cascade terminology leaks into conventional venues
discrepancies.description: W4 GPT-5.5 explicitly identified elevated reputational coupling risk if SIARC/cascade governance terminology (M-axis, V0, RULE 1, cascade-132, etc.) leaks into Zenodo descriptions, arXiv abstracts, or venue cover letters. Convergent across all 4 witnesses in Q2c/Q3c. D-153-3 linguistic firewall template (Q5b) is the canonical mitigation.
discrepancies.mitigation: templates/d_153_3_firewall_template.md applied to every post-lift artefact

discrepancies.title: Picture-chain artefact class semantically unstable
discrepancies.description: W4 GPT-5.5 noted that picture-chain v1.20+ is semantically ambiguous between three roles: closure-administration record / mathematical synthesis narrative / archival supplement. This ambiguity is the underlying cause of D-154-1 divergence. Resolving it (operator decides explicit role) would also resolve D-154-1.
